# Fery Yundara Putera — Portfolio

> Senior Software Engineer with 12+ years building EdTech, AI-first systems, and full-stack products shipped at scale.

## Identity

- **Name:** Fery Yundara Putera
- **Role:** Senior Software Engineer
- **Location:** Indonesia
- **Email:** feryyp.work@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/feryyp
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/daefery
- **Blog:** https://medium.com/@feryyp
- **Portfolio:** https://daefery.github.io

## Summary

Fery is a senior full-stack engineer specialising in EdTech platforms, AI-assisted development, and high-throughput web systems. Core developer on edbot.ai — an AI learning platform delivering 32M+ lessons across 10+ countries with 100K+ peak monthly active learners.

12+ years of professional experience spanning React, Next.js, Node.js, Django, Laravel, ASP.NET MVC, React Native, and Android. Skilled in CI/CD pipelines, Selenium E2E testing, agentic AI workflows, and UX-to-production delivery.

Available for senior engineering roles, technical consulting, and EdTech/AI product collaborations globally.

## Tech Stack

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, Vue.js, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, Figma
**Backend:** Node.js, Django, Laravel, ASP.NET MVC, REST APIs
**Mobile:** React Native, Android (Java)
**Data:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, Firebase
**DevOps:** Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Selenium E2E
**AI/ML:** LLM integration, agentic workflows, AI-assisted content generation

## Key Projects

- **edbot.ai** — AI learning platform, 32M+ lessons, 10+ countries, 100K+ MAU (Solve Education!)
- **edbot.ai v2** — Full rebuild with XP streaks, learning paths, interactive lessons, and spaced repetition
- **Learnalytics** — Internal analytics dashboard for learner engagement tracking (Solve Education!)
- **Dawn of Civilization** — Fullstack educational history game in Django (Solve Education!)
- **Edbot Challenge** — Challenge platform transitioning Dawn of Civilization players to Edbot
- **Ed The Bot** — Web portal for Solve Education's AI chatbot for English learning and job skills
- **Plareon: Daily Hoops** — Android basketball training game with IAP and daily drills
- **Qadha** — Android app for Muslims to rebuild salah consistency with a 30-day guided reset journey, prayer tracker, Islamic audio library, and daily reflection system. Free. [Landing page](https://daefery.github.io/products/qadha/) · [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.qadha.islam)
- **Solve Employment** — Job platform for EdTech graduates across Southeast Asia
- **Solve Education! Profile** — Company profile for social enterprise using AI to democratise learning
- **Solve for Change** — Microgrant program site supporting youth-led projects across Southeast Asia
- **Yayasan Muda Berdaya Berdikari** — NGO company profile for Solve Education's Indonesian foundation
- **Localizy** — Localisation SaaS for multi-language content workflows (Xtremax)
- **Content+** — AI-assisted content creation platform with LLM integration
- **Dompu Apps** — Government mobile app for public services (React Native + Figma)
- **SICC Singapore** — Cricket club membership portal in ASP.NET MVC (Xtremax)
- **Mendaki Challenge** — Gamified youth engagement portal (Xtremax)
- **Katalogin** — SaaS tool for restaurants and shops to build digital menus and product catalogs
- **Lampalampa App** — Mobile UX design for Indonesia travel, local food, and artisan goods
- **LampaGo** — WhatsApp bot for airport transfers, deliveries, and errands
- **Playnology** — Online store for educational toys and STEM kits

## Career

- **Solve Education!** — Core developer, EdTech platform engineering, AI-first product development. Built and maintained edbot.ai serving millions of learners in emerging markets.
- **Xtremax** — Enterprise web and government portal development across Singapore and Southeast Asia.
- **Independent** — Mobile, UX/UI, and SaaS projects (Android, React Native, Figma, WhatsApp bots).

## Writing

Engineering articles on Medium covering full-stack development, EdTech architecture, CI/CD, and AI-first engineering. Published regularly at https://medium.com/@feryyp

Topics include: React, Next.js, Django, PostgreSQL, GitHub Actions, Selenium, LLM integration, software architecture, remote engineering.

## Site Structure

- `/` — Overview, philosophy, skills, and career stats
- `/resume` — Full professional history, tech stack, and experience
- `/works` — Portfolio of 12+ shipped products across web, mobile, and UX
- `/blog` — Engineering articles and technical logs (via Medium RSS)
- `/contact` — Contact and collaboration enquiries
- `/products/qadha/` — Landing page for Qadha, an Android app for rebuilding salah consistency
